level_signals: Expected to engage with engineers on architecture decisions

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of product management experience, with meaningful time working with large language models directly.
must_haves.qualifier: with meaningful time working with large language models directly

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience shipping AI products at the frontier — you deeply understand frontier model capabilities and limitations, evaluation challenges, and the unique UX considerations of non-deterministic systems.
Track record of 0→1 product development — you've taken an early-stage product and driven it to broad adoption; comfortable with high ambiguity and rapid iteration.
Strong technical depth — ability to engage meaningfully with engineers on architecture decisions (e.g., harness design and engineering, workspace isolation, API design).

scope.surface: Ghostwriter — the agent-building agent; end-to-end product experience from prompt → agent → outcome across chat, voice, and email channels
primary_metrics_inferred: Adoption of Ghostwriter by CX teams and developers
Agent quality and deployment success rate
core_responsibilities: Define how AI augments agent development — shape the workflows by which CX teams and developers draft journeys, run simulations, analyze conversations, and improve agents using natural language.

Balance autonomy and control — design the right human-in-the-loop patterns (approval flows, change review, workspace isolation) so customers trust Ghostwriter to make meaningful changes to their agents.
Partner deeply with AI/ML and platform engineering — collaborate on model selection, harness engineering, execution architecture, and evaluation/testing infrastructure.
Be the voice of the agent builder — deeply understand the pain points of CX managers, agent developers, and technical teams configuring journeys, integrations, and simulations.

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies.

green_flags: High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong AI and tech pedigree
Clear product surface and ownership area (Ghostwriter)
Encourages applications even if experience doesn't precisely match the job description
Equity participation mentioned for full-time employees
Company culture explicitly values family/parental support alongside intensity
red_flags: Primarily in-person San Francisco role — eliminates remote candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
No nice-to-haves listed — requirements may be interpreted as strictly enforced
Compensation, benefits, and equity terms subject to change at any time
